title: Strategy context brief: ProductOS next-version discover proof
context_summary: ProductOS needs a reusable strategy spine before expanding discover depth so the next-version loop improves PM judgment rather than just drafting speed.

enterprise_goal_links.linkage_summary: The next version should prove a strategy-ready discover wedge that a buyer can understand quickly.

portfolio_bets.rationale: The repo already has governed downstream structure, so the main gap is clearer strategic framing before problem and PRD work.

business_model_outcomes.linkage_summary: A sharper strategy packet should make ProductOS easier to explain, trust, and evaluate.

strategic_constraints.constraint: Keep the stable line and external claim boundary unchanged.
strategic_constraints.consequence: The strategy slice must stay internal-first and should improve clarity without broadening claims.

strategic_constraints.constraint: Favor repo-native, reviewable standards over prompt-only behavior.
strategic_constraints.consequence: Strategy logic needs explicit artifacts and traceable downstream references.

open_questions: Which strategy signals should be visible by default in the first PM-facing packet?

evidence_refs.justification: The raw notes lock the must-win discover wedge and repo-first constraint: # Next Version Superpowers
The transcript makes the release bar explicit: Speaker 2: The next version is only believable if the repo can turn messy notes and transcripts into a decision-ready package.
